query: SELECT tv.id, tv.studentId, tv.voteRank, tv.createdAt, tn.name as teacher_name FROM teacher_votes tv JOIN teacher_names tn ON tv.teacherNameId = tn.id WHERE tv.studentId = 121318 ORDER BY tv.createdAt DESC;
